gmwmx2 0.0.4
  • Reference
    • Data generation
    • Load and plot data from the Nevada Geodetic Laboratory
    • Estimate a model
    • Estimate a small network of GNSS station
    • Plot a large network of GNSS station

Package index

Stochastic models and simulation

wn()
White noise process
ar1()
AR(1) process
pl()
Stationary Power-Law process
matern()
Matérn process
rw()
Random walk process
flicker()
Flicker noise process
`+`(<time_series_model>)
Add two model objects
`+`(<sum_model>)
Add to a sum_model
generate()
Generate a time series from a model
plot(<generated_time_series>)
Plot a generated time series
plot(<generated_composite_model_time_series>)
Plot a generated composite time series

Load and plot NGL data

download_station_ngl()
Download GNSS position time series and steps reference from the Nevada Geodetic Laboratory with IGS14 or IGS20 reference frame.
download_all_stations_ngl()
Download all stations name and location from the Nevada Geodetic Laboratory
download_estimated_velocities_ngl()
Download estimated velocities provided by the Nevada Geodetic Laboratory for all stations.
plot(<gnss_ts_ngl>)
Plot a gnss_ts_ngl object

Estimate a model

gmwmx2()
Estimate a trajectory model for a gnss_ts_ngl object considering a white noise plus colored noise as the stochastic model for the residuals and model missingness with a Markov process using the GMWMX estimator.
gmwm2()
Estimate stochastic model parameters by matching wavelet variance
summary(<fit_gnss_ts_ngl>)
Extract estimated parameters from a fit_gnss_ts_ngl
plot(<fit_gnss_ts_ngl>)
Plot a fit_gnss_ts_ngl object

Data

df_estimated_velocities_gmwmx
Estimated northward and eastward velocity and their standard deviation using the GMWMX estimator

On this page

Developed by Lionel Voirol, Haotian Xu, Yuming Zhang, Luca Insolia, Roberto Molinari, Stéphane Guerrier.
